title: Trivantage
description: Trivantage is a wholesale supplier specializing in awning, marine, and upholstery fabrics, offering over 9,000 products for makers. The company provides built-for-purpose materials and hardware for shade systems, durable materials for custom marine builds, and stylish furnishings. With a commitment to customer success, Trivantage ensures quick delivery, dedicated expert help, and exclusive benefits through its Trivantage Plus membership. Their extensive selection and reliable service make them a trusted partner for businesses in need of quality supplies.
